user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the list of salary revision approvers with their template name, period basis, location, departments and approvers, so that I can review the current approval configuration
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Salary Revision Approvers screen; When the list loads; Then each approver record shows template name, period to be based on, location, departments, employee class specific and approver(s)

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new salary revision approver, so that salary revisions route to the correct approvers
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Salary Revision Approvers screen; When I click Add new salary revision approver and complete the setup; Then a new approver configuration is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing salary revision approver, so that I can keep the approval routing up to date
acceptance_criteria: Given an approver record exists in the list; When I click Edit and change its details; Then the updated configuration is saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to configure the period the revision is based on and the applicable location and departments, so that approvals apply to the right employees
acceptance_criteria: Given I am adding or editing an approver; When I set the period to be based on, location and departments; Then the approver applies only to matching employees

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to specify whether an approver configuration is employee class specific and define the approver hierarchy, so that approvals follow the correct reporting chain
acceptance_criteria: Given I am configuring an approver; When I set employee class specific and select the approver hierarchy; Then the configuration is saved with the chosen approver(s)

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through the approvers list, so that I can find a specific configuration when many exist
acceptance_criteria: Given the approvers list spans multiple pages; When I use the paging controls; Then the corresponding page of approver records is displayed
